messages.content: Hi, I saw the 3-bedroom house listing. Is it available from January 2026?
Yes it should be! The current tenants are leaving end of December. How many people in your group?
We are 3 — all male students from Faculty of Computing. Can we negotiate the rental a bit?
Noted! I will inform you once I confirm with my housemate.

last_message: The rent is RM280/month per person. Utilities split equally, usually around RM40-50 extra.

The rent is RM280/month per person. Utilities split equally, usually around RM40-50 extra.
